name: Chuck Faranda Professional Planetary Nebula Workflow
description: Optimized for planetary nebulae with emphasis on resolving fine shell structure while protecting bright cores.

steps.note: Crop only stacking artifacts. Preserve faint outer halos.
Remove pedestal without clipping faint outer shells.
Preferred: AutoBGE. Alternatives: GraXpert AI or VeraLux Nox. Preserve faint halos.
Neutralize the background while maintaining accurate shell colors.
Preferred: SPCC. Verify natural OIII/Hα color balance.
Preferred: BlurXTerminator (25–40%) then NoiseXTerminator (light). StarXTerminator is optional for separate shell processing. Alternatives: SyQon Parallax and SyQon Prism.
Preferred: Generalized Hyperbolic Stretch. Use multiple gentle stretches to protect bright cores and reveal faint outer shells.
Enhance shell contrast carefully; avoid clipping the central nebula.
Optional. Apply locally to emphasize filamentary shell detail.
Archive a 16-bit TIFF master before export.

author: Chuck Faranda
